title: AutoTotemX
description: Automatically refills your off-hand with another Totem of Undying the instant one activates.
body:
🛡️ AutoTotemX (Client)

Version: 1.0.0 — Fabric 1.21.9

Description

Never lose a hardcore world or PvP fight because you ran out of totems!
Auto Totem (Client) automatically refills your off-hand with a fresh Totem of Undying the moment one activates — no inventory shuffling or lag delay required. This mod is completely client-side, meaning you can use it on any server without needing server approval or mod installation.

✨ Features

🔁 Instantly replaces your used totem with a new one from your inventory

⚙️ Fully client-side — works on vanilla, modded, and multiplayer servers

⚡ Optimized for zero lag or packet spam

🎨 Clean mod icon and metadata for Mod Menu users

💎 Perfect for PvP, hardcore survival, and high-latency servers

🧱 Requirements

Fabric Loader: 0.17.3+

Minecraft: 1.21.9

Fabric API: Latest for 1.21.9

📦 Optional Mods (Recommended)

Mod Menu – for an in-game mod list & icon display

YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) – if you want to add future toggle or delay settings

🧠 Notes

This mod does not modify game balance or require server-side installation.
It’s purely a quality-of-life improvement that helps you stay alive and focused on combat or exploration instead of fumbling with your inventory.
